User.title: User
User.description: A SquadLock user tracking their LeetCode progress.

teamId.description: ID of the team the user belongs to

individualPoints.description: Total points earned by the user

isCompletedToday.description: Whether the user finished today's challenge

isBenched.description: Whether the user is currently benched from the team

favoriteApp.description: The primary app to be locked

hasSkipDay.description: Whether the user has a skip day available

assignedProblemSlug.description: The slug of the problem assigned to the user for today

Team.title: Team
Team.description: A group of users competing together.

groupPoints.description: Total points earned by the team

currentProgress.description: Number of members who completed today's challenge

lastBonusDate.description: The last date a team bonus was awarded (YYYY-MM-DD)

leaderboardRank.description: Current rank on the global leaderboard

Vote.title: Vote
Vote.description: A vote to bench a member.
